data.title: Commencement of construction of stage II of the Seileri Kvartal development in Pärnu
data.description: Construction has begun on the next phase of the Seileri Kvartal residential project in Pärnu by Nordecon AS. The second stage involves building two apartment buildings at Rääma 7c/1 and Rääma 7c/2, with heights of four to five storeys. This phase will deliver 25 apartments and 4 commercial units, anticipated for completion by spring 2027.

data.title: ZINZINO AB (PUBL.): ANNA FRICK RESIGNS FROM THE BOARD OF ZINZINO
data.description: Anna Frick will be stepping down from her position on the board of Zinzino AB (publ.) due to personal reasons. The decision was made public on April 17, 2026, in Gothenburg, Sweden. Frick requested to resign from her role as a member of the Board of Directors. She was originally elected to the position in [year].

data.title: Multilingual book on Hainan free trade port unveiled at Boao Forum
data.description: In BOAO, China on April 17, 2026, a report from China.org.cn highlighted the launch of multilingual versions of a book on China's Hainan free trade port. Titled "Keywords to Understand China: The Hainan Free Trade Port," the unveiling took place at a press conference commemorating 100 days post-release.

data.title: Zoomlion Strengthens Localized Manufacturing and Service Capabilities as Hungary MEWP Factory Begins Operations
data.description: In TATABÁNYA, Hungary on April 17, 2026, Zoomlion has launched Phase I of its Hungary MEWP Intelligent Factory, while progressing with Phase II of its German factory project. The company involved is Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd., listed as 1157.HK. These developments mark significant milestones for Zoomlion.

data.title: Penetrium Bioscience Unveils Breakthrough Mechanism Solving 137-Year-Old "Seed & Soil" Paradigm, Opening a New Era for Targeted Cancer Therapy
data.description: Today, on April 17, 2026, in Seoul, South Korea, Penetrium Bioscience, listed on the KOSDAQ as 187660, revealed significant scientific findings. These findings offer a pioneering insight into the "Seed & Soil" theory, proposed by the company. The research showcases, for the initial time on a cellular level, the fundamental mechanism supporting this theory.

data.title: Man behind Meta-1 Coin scam, Robert Dunlap, receives 23-year sentence for defrauding 1,000 investors of $20M.
data.description: Robert Dunlap, a man from Texas, has been sentenced to 23 years in federal prison for his involvement in the Meta-1 Coin fraud scheme. This fraudulent scheme defrauded approximately 1,000 investors of $20 million.

data.title: Counterfeit Ledger wallets with covert WiFi chips emerge in Chinese markets, as $9.5M losses occur from fraudulent apps.
data.description: After a security researcher reveals the presence of counterfeit Ledger devices containing hidden wireless antennas intended for cryptocurrency theft, a wave of concern sweeps through the industry. This revelation follows closely on the heels of losses totaling $9.5 million due to fake cryptocurrency apps. The discovery underscores the growing threat of fraudulent activities targeting digital assets, prompting users to remain vigilant and take precautionary measures.

data.title: 12 DeFi protocols breached in 2 weeks after $280M Drift exploit. $13.7M lost in Grinex, $7.6M in Rhea Finance hacks.
data.description: Since April 1, there have been a minimum of 12 crypto protocols that have experienced attacks, highlighted by the Drift Protocol hack. Major losses have been reported, such as $13.7 million from Grinex and $7.6 million from Rhea Finance. For more information, click the link provided.

data.title: Emdoor Digital Shines at the 139th Canton Fair with AI Hard-Core Technology, Defining a New Vision for Future Smart Living
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, Emdoor Digital participated in the Canton Fair from April 15th to 19th, 2026, unveiling an innovative range of products. The showcased lineup included cutting-edge AI laptops, e-ink tablets dedicated to eye-care, and smart terminals. This demonstration garnered significant attention and praise at the event.

data.title: Orthogon Therapeutics Raises an Additional $11M Financing for Its BK Virus Antiviral Drug Program
data.description: In Canton, Massachusetts, Orthogon Therapeutics has recently completed a follow-on financing round, securing $11 million. This brings their total capital raised to $36 million. The funding will be utilized to further develop their groundbreaking drug aimed at combating BK polyomavirus, a significant source of complications in transplant recipients. Presently, there are no approved treatments for BK virus infections. The company is at the forefront of creating an oral therapy designed to tackle the complete range of BK infection, starting from early reactivation.

data.title: Hexagon Composites ASA: Annual Report 2025
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 17, 2026, the Board of Directors of Hexagon Composites ASA has given their approval for the company's Annual Report 2025, encompassing sustainability declarations. Included in the decision are essential documents: Hexagon Composites' Annual Report 2025 in the European Single.

data.title: Hardware Security Modules Market Outlook 2026-2031: 10.02% CAGR Growth Driven by Increasing Cybersecurity Investments and Secure Key Management Needs, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of April 17, 2026, the hardware security modules market was worth $1.98 billion in 2025. The market is estimated to increase from $2.18 billion in 2026 to $3.51 billion by 2031, showing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.02%, as per the latest report by Mordor Intelligence.
